_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: ⚠ macro risk HIGH/BEARISH blocks new longs (allow_new_longs=false). This is still the raw technical signal (not suppressed — a human decides manually here), but treat it as a NO-GO until macro risk eases. Signals based on 2026-07-13 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Strike interval is an approximation — verify actual listed strikes in Kite option chain. No lot size shown (not available from any live source) — figures are per-share, not total cost. ⚠ LIQUIDITY UNVERIFIED — no open-interest or bid-ask data exists anywhere in this system; this strike is chosen by moneyness only and may be thin or wide-spread. Check the live option chain before assuming it's fillable near this premium.
ICICIBANK.commentary: BUY_CE (4/6 votes): price 1410.6 is above EMA18 (1378.96) and EMA50 (1338.85) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (26.86) is below its signal line (28.26) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price broke above pivot resistance R1 (1409.73) -- breakout confirmed (+2 CE) | 5-day momentum (ROC5 -1.14%) is muted -- no edge from this factor ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.
